description_long: This is a rectangular, pillow-shaped snack package with a predominantly green exterior. The front features playful illustrations, including a cartoon cat wearing a hat and a lion with a crown, surrounded by tropical leaves and whimsical patterns. The central area displays the brand name 'Zik' in bold, stylized letters, bordered by a white panel. Additional decorative elements include a small flag motif and various line art graphics, giving the packaging a lively and inviting appearance. The sides and back of the package continue the green theme, with repeated illustrations and branding. The packaging appears to be made of a flexible, glossy plastic material, typical for snack foods.
description: A green, rectangular snack package with cartoon animal illustrations and bold 'Zik' branding, made of glossy plastic. The design is playful and colorful, featuring tropical and whimsical motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Zik' brand name, cartoon cat and lion, and most of the decorative graphics on a green background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lion illustration and part of the cat, with the green packaging and some text visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing both the cat and lion illustrations, as well as the white brand panel and green background.
description_view_3: Angled side view focusing on the cat illustration and the continuation of the green, decorated packaging.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'Zik' is prominently displayed in the center of the front face, in bold green stylized letters on a white rectangular background.
attribute_flavor_indication: No explicit flavor indication is visible; the packaging features animal graphics and tropical motifs but no clear flavor text or imagery.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Cartoon mascots (cat and lion) are present on the front and sides, serving as playful promotional graphics.
